title: Ordering in Views
excerpt: Hello. I was wondering. Is there some way to Order items in a view. In Trello for example you could see you had 12 cards  on a list and you could move a card to position 3 and the cards in 3rd and forward position would …

posts.author: KierAyre (Anthony Angell)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello. I was wondering. Is there some way to Order items in a view. In Trello for example you could see you had 12 cards on a list and you could move a card to position 3 and the cards in 3rd and forward position would move down. Dragging the items is, well, a drag I am trying to easily keep lots of tasks in Priority order when for example there are 3 Mission Critical tasks, which goes First in order of priority.

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @KierAyre,

Did you try the Sort button?
